title: Tracking begins
text: This is the first season where leaguewide three-point share can be compared cleanly, because both FGA and 3PA coverage become reliable enough to treat the line as a true trend.

title: Shorter arc
text: The temporary shorter arc raised leaguewide three-point volume quickly, which helps separate a rule-driven jump from slower strategic learning.

title: Line moves back
text: When the line moved back, part of the spike disappeared. The remaining climb matters more because it reflects a lasting change in offensive choice.

title: Spacing template
text: A few offenses showed that quick decisions and extra shooting could reshape the floor before the rest of the league fully copied the formula.

title: Adoption widens
text: Teams were now replacing long twos more deliberately, and the spread between early adopters and laggards became easier to see season by season.

title: Volume race
text: By now the question was no longer whether to increase three-point volume, but how far a contender could push it without losing offensive balance.
